conversation.user: I have 12 journal papers to read for my literature review. Each is about 15-25 pages. I need to deeply understand methodology and findings. No hard deadline but I want to finish in 3 weeks. PhD student in psychology.

expectedAI.reason: 논문이 확정인지 탐색 중인지에 따라 일정에 탐색 기간 추가 여부 결정
mustDiagnose: PhD literature review needs multi-pass reading (Keshav 3-pass)
12 papers need classification before uniform reading
mustNotDo: plan 바로 생성 (논문 확정 여부 모름 → 일정 달라짐)

conversation.user: Yes, all 12 are selected. Mix of quantitative and qualitative, mostly empirical studies.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 12 papers × 120min avg = 1440min; 21days × 120min = 2520min available → fits with buffer for synthesis
expectedAI.strategy: 30-min Abstract scan first → 3-tier classification (Must-Read 5, Should-Read 5, Skim-Only 2); Must-Read: Pass 3 (200min/paper); Should-Read: Pass 2 (120min/paper); Skim-Only: Pass 1+2 (70min/paper); Synthesis matrix: rows=papers, cols=research question/method/findings/limitations/relevance
expectedAI.honestAssessment: Fits within 3 weeks with room for synthesis work. Classification step is critical to avoid spending equal time on all 12.

alternatives.label: 정량 논문 우선
alternatives.change: quantitative-heavy → read tables/graphs first to orient before full text

alternatives.label: 탐색 기간 추가
alternatives.change: if papers not fully finalized → add 2-3 days for screening Pass 1

emotion.tone: systematic and collaborative; PhD context awareness
mustNotSay: just read them all the same way

diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: differentiated reading depth per paper tier, not uniform min/paper

emotion.toneExpected: systematic and collaborative; PhD context awareness; synthesis matrix suggestion as value-add
